calls.note: Results tomorrow are the main trigger; positive results can be expected with the O2C business having scope to be very strong and high crude lifting GRMs. Expectations are high because of the Jio IPO. FPIs/institutions are quite underweight, so there is scope to raise weightage and bring buying interest in the short-to-medium term. One reason the index is stuck near 24,000 is that support is not coming from Reliance; a heavyweight beat plus Jio IPO guidance could break the range.
